ops.title: unix sockets: macOS sun_path caps at 104 bytes
ops.body: macOS caps `sockaddr_un.sun_path` at 104 bytes, and `t.TempDir()` paths routinely exceed it. Every test that binds a unix socket therefore mints a short-path directory instead of using the test temp dir: Go via `wiretest.SocketDir` (registered for cleanup on t) and `proc/spawn_test.go`'s shortSockDir; Swift via the shared shortSocketDir test helper in Tests/DaemonKitTests (extracted from the formerly-duplicated copies in PeerTrustTests and SocketServerTests). SocketServer surfaces the same limit at runtime as `SocketServerError.pathTooLong`. This fact was once stated in four places — it lives here now.
